description:
Single-value read result returned from `GET .../data/{data-id}`.

Provenance: `commons/types.yaml#ReadValue`. Rust-named
`SovdReadValue` for the same reason as [`SovdValue`].

data.description: Decoded value payload (`AnyValue` per spec — open).

errors.description: Errors encountered while reading parts of `data`.

schema.description: Optional embedded JSON Schema describing the response shape.
